title: A Caution To Poets
content:
What poets feel not, when they make,
    A pleasure in creating,
    The world, in its turn, will not take
    Pleasure in contemplating
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Matthew Arnold delivers a powerful performance in "A Caution To Poets"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
